checks.name: sport_confirmed_match_seed_count
checks.notes: Counts matches with status=completed from the live API.

checks.name: sport_incremental_open_match_rows
checks.notes: Open rows are expected while the season is in progress.

checks.name: sport_team_advanced_stats_rows
checks.notes: Sport team stats should grow incrementally as completed matches expose statistics on SofaScore.

checks.name: serie_b_incremental_round_seed_count
checks.notes: A live season should not require all 38 rounds upfront.

checks.name: serie_b_full_season_coverage
checks.notes: This is informational during the live season and becomes mandatory only after season completion.

checks.name: serie_b_round_1_completed_results
checks.notes: This measures whether round 1 already has enough final scores for basic analysis.

checks.name: serie_b_team_advanced_stats_rows
checks.notes: Two rows per match are expected for full round-level team analysis.

checks.name: serie_b_team_advanced_stats_confirmed_consistency
checks.notes: Confirmed rows cannot have empty required advanced metrics.
